Ethereum Price Surge Confirmed: Up ~4% to $2,403 on April 22 Amid Recent Gains | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum (ETH) rose $98.74 (4.3%) from April 21's $2,305 to $2,403.78 by 9:15 a.m. ET on April 22, 2026, marking a short-term **uptrend** after a minor dip, with Bitcoin steady at ~$78k.[1][3][7]
